ThingDef.label: Thanato-Genesis serum
ThingDef.description: An experimental biotechnological serum designed to emulate mechanoid resurrection protocols without mechanites. It forces an extreme regenerative cascade that reboots cardiac and neural activity while reconstructing damaged tissues through accelerated biological consumption. The process is unstable and imprecise, often restoring life with severe neurological and organ trauma. In many cases, the subject survives in a permanently impaired state. Repeated administration may be required for heavily degraded remains. Failure is common.
